notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman grounds into a double play, third baseman Casey Schmitt to first baseman Bryce Eldridge. Hunter Goodman scores. TJ Rumfield out at 3rd. Cole Carrigg to 2nd. Tyler Freeman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman grounds into a double play, third baseman Casey Schmitt to first baseman Bryce Eldridge. Hunter Goodman scores. TJ Rumfield out at 3rd. Cole Carrigg to 2nd. Tyler Freeman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Hunter Goodman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Rockies challenged (force play), call on the field was upheld: Hunter Goodman grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Bryce Eldridge. Jake McCarthy to 3rd. Mickey Moniak out at 2nd. Hunter Goodman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Hunter Goodman rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Rockies challenged (force play), call on the field was upheld: Hunter Goodman grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Bryce Eldridge. Jake McCarthy to 3rd. Mickey Moniak out at 2nd. Hunter Goodman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Jung Hoo Lee singles on a bunt ground ball to pitcher Ryan Feltner. Jung Hoo Lee to 2nd. Jung Hoo Lee advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by pitcher Ryan Feltner.

notableEvents.label: Jake McCarthy grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Jake McCarthy hits a grand slam (9) to right center field. Edouard Julien scores. Kyle Karros scores. Ezequiel Tovar scores.

notableEvents.label: Braxton Fulford pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Braxton Fulford grounds out, shortstop Christian Koss to first baseman Bryce Eldridge.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Bryce Eldridge reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Kyle Karros.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Bryce Eldridge reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Bryce Eldridge reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Kyle Karros.

notableEvents.label: Victor Bericoto GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Victor Bericoto grounds into a double play, shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to second baseman Edouard Julien to first baseman Brett Sullivan. Bryce Eldridge out at 2nd. Victor Bericoto out at 1st.
